parts.label: Primary Structure (3U)

parts.label: Solar Panel x 4 (deploy)

parts.label: Antenna Deployer x 2
parts.spec: Tape-spring UHF/S-band antenna deployer, stowed flat, burn-wire release, latching tab

parts.label: Star Tracker Mount
parts.spec: Star tracker optical bench mount, CTE-matched, baffled sun shield, line-of-sight +-1deg

parts.label: Payload Optics Bench
parts.spec: EO payload optics bench, thermal stability, optical baffles, focal plane interface, lens mounts

parts.label: Cold Gas Thruster x 4
parts.spec: Cold gas propulsion thruster bracket, 4 thrusters cross-pattern, 50mN class, plumbing manifold

parts.label: Separation Spring Plate
parts.spec: P-POD or ISIPOD separation interface plate, spring pusher contact, kill switch arm

parts.label: EPS Solar Charging Module

parts.label: CDH Avionics Stack

parts.label: Thermal Path / Radiator Strap Evidence
parts.spec: Thermal_path closure module: radiator_face, thermal_strap_note, vent_hole, battery-to-frame conduction pad, service-visible thermal datum, inspection label, mass budget <120g

parts.label: Integration Harness + Datum Spine
parts.spec: Integration_harness closure spine with harness_channel, connector_keying, assembly_datum pads, routing clips, service hatch, reciprocal interface labels, inspection checklist marks

verify.value: All required fields are present and correctly formatted.
verify.rule: Ensure all necessary fields and structures are included in the blueprint.
Ensure the mass budget estimate is accurate and consistent with the design.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets are present in part_tree and geometry_ops.
verify.rule: Ensure all design features from P0 are traceable in the geometry.

verify.value: All interfaces are named and reciprocal.
verify.rule: Ensure all interfaces have named and reciprocal counterparts in neighboring subsystems.

verify.value: All critical joints have visible locking evidence.
verify.rule: Ensure all critical joints have visible locking or preload evidence.

verify.value: Fixture points, thermal zones, and pressure faces are correctly defined.
verify.rule: Ensure boundary conditions for downstream CFD/FEA are correctly specified.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to extreme temperature cycling (-40 to +80C).
risk.mit: Conduct thermal cycling tests to validate material performance.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure under launch loads if not properly designed.
risk.mit: Perform FEA to verify structural integrity under launch loads.

risk.desc: Service access may be limited due to tight integration with other subsystems.
risk.mit: Ensure sufficient clearance for service access during design.

risk.desc: Incorrect alignment of rail guides could affect deployment accuracy.
risk.mit: Verify rail guide alignment during assembly and include alignment checks in QA.

risk.desc: Insufficient fastener preload could lead to loose connections.
risk.mit: Include torque specifications and ensure proper fastener torquing during assembly.

verify.value: All required features and interfaces are present and correctly named.
verify.rule: Each internal_feature_target must have at least 4 dedicated geometry_ops that reference it by id or target name.

verify.value: Mass estimation is provided and plausible for the subsystem.
verify.rule: cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value.

verify.value: P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.
verify.rule: [p0_feature_mapping] good: P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.

verify.value: Adjacent interfaces have reciprocal definitions in neighboring subsystems.
verify.rule: name exact neighboring subsystem labels when they mate, and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature so the neighbor can declare the same joint family back.

verify.value: Critical joints have visible locking or preload evidence.
verify.rule: critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.

verify.value: Boundary conditions are defined for downstream CFD/FEA.
verify.rule: verify must include a boundary_conditions object with fixture_points, thermal_zones, and pressure_faces.

risk.desc: Potential thermal cycling issues due to material choice.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal cycling tests on Al 7075 + CFRP + FR4 materials.

risk.desc: Risk of burn wire not releasing due to manufacturing defects.
risk.mit: Implement quality control checks on burn wire installation.

risk.desc: Deployment shock may cause structural damage.
risk.mit: Perform shock testing and adjust spring preload as necessary.

risk.desc: Incorrect alignment during assembly may affect deployment.
risk.mit: Ensure strict adherence to assembly sequence and use proper alignment tools.

risk.desc: Insufficient service access may hinder maintenance.
risk.mit: Increase service access cut size for easier maintenance.

physics_paths.description: Solar radiation absorbed and converted to electrical energy.
Spring-loaded hinge allows panel to rotate and deploy.
Thermal management via solar panel material properties.
Ground control to monitor and control deployment.

integration_opportunities.description: Antenna slot for service access and harness routing.
Service access cut for ground control.

risk.desc: Thermal cycling may cause unexpected deformation due to material mismatch.

risk.desc: Radiation exposure could degrade electronic components over time.
risk.mit: Use radiation-hardened components and shielding where possible.

risk.desc: Deployment shock might damage the antenna if not properly tested.
risk.mit: Perform shock tests to ensure the antenna can withstand deployment forces.

risk.mit: Ensure all fasteners are torqued to the correct specification.

risk.desc: Solar pressure may affect the satellite's orientation if not accounted for.
risk.mit: Include solar pressure calculations in the satellite's attitude control system.

risk.desc: The subsystem may experience thermal cycling issues due to the proximity of thermal sources and sinks.
